statement.markdown: Given a Trie data structure and a stream of words, implement a method to insert each word into the Trie. The method should update the Trie nodes as words are inserted.
statement.inputFormat: The input will contain a list of words to be inserted into the Trie, where each word is a string of lowercase English letters.
statement.outputFormat: The method should update the Trie nodes and return True if all words are inserted successfully, False otherwise.

examples.explanation: The method should update the Trie nodes as words are inserted
The method should update the Trie nodes as words are inserted

hints.text: Check the Trie node update logic
